title: Law No. 23 of 2018 Promulgating the Health Insurance Law
summary: Adjacent digital health instrument creating specific health-data governance duties through health information processing, electronic interconnection, electronic medical records, and safeguards for beneficiaries’ health and personal data.

theme_notes.data_privacy.personal_data_protection: Establishes health data processing and electronic medical record obligations.
theme_notes.data_privacy.data_governance_open_data: Establishes health-sector data collection and information-system obligations.
theme_notes.digital_health.health_data: Establishes unified electronic medical record and health information obligations.
